monthly_reports.summary: During July 2026, a total of 1400 headlines were analyzed across 10 language services. BBC Mundo maintained the most positive outlook (+0.02 avg polarity), while BBC Russian showed the most negative sentiment (-0.21). Overall sentiment improved by 0.02 compared to the previous period.
